title: citrus × nobilis subf. tankan
intro: Citrus × nobilis subf. tankan, also known as sudachi, is a species of citrus plant native to Japan, characterized by its small, round fruits and aromatic leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its high concentration of limonene, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of sudachi include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Sudachi is often used in herbal preparations, such as tea infusions and essential oil extracts, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
